overall.description: A stationary first-person perspective from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character watching television in a modern apartment. The TV displays various programs including abstract graphics, a talk show with two animated characters, and futuristic advertisements, while city buildings are visible through the large window behind the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern apartment living room with entertainment center

events.description: TV screen transitions from bright white light beams to darker circuit board animation with teal graphics
TV content shifts from abstract graphics to character-based television program

agents.ego_description: sitting stationary on a couch watching the television display abstract graphics and chip animations

large flatscreen television displaying abstract light beam graphics
modern entertainment unit with gold-colored cabinet doors beneath the television
dark wooden table positioned in front of the television
white remote control resting on the coffee table
glass containing amber liquid on the coffee table

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a static view of a modern apartment living room. A large television displays abstract graphics with light beams and circuit board animations. Through the window behind the TV, a sunny cityscape is visible. The coffee table in the foreground holds a remote control and a drinking glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment living room watching television talk show

events.description: television program begins featuring character with large afro hairstyle in purple top
second character with purple hair and yellow outfit enters the television program
characters on television begin dancing energetically with arm gestures

agents.ego_description: watching the television program featuring two characters conversing and performing

notable_agents.action: character with afro hairstyle wearing purple mesh top and green pants dancing and gesturing on the TV screen
character with purple mohawk wearing yellow outfit with red accents talking and moving on the TV screen

changed.to: displaying talk show with two animated characters interacting

segments.scene_description: The television program transitions to a talk show format featuring two animated characters. One character with a large afro and purple outfit dances and gestures, while a second character with purple hair and a yellow jacket enters and interacts with the first. The camera remains stationary, focused on the TV screen where the characters perform various movements and gestures against a dark studio background with holographic elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment living room watching TV commercials

events.description: television switches to red NC54 channel identification screen
TV displays weapon advertisement for Techtronika RT-46 Burster with red background
TV displays food advertisement for Soybean Machistados with teal background

agents.ego_description: watching television advertisements for a weapon and food product

changed.from: displaying talk show with two characters
changed.to: displaying commercial advertisements with red and teal graphics

segments.scene_description: The television content transitions to commercial breaks. The screen first shows a red NC54 channel logo, followed by an advertisement for a Techtronika weapon featuring a man holding a large firearm. The final advertisement promotes Soybean Machistados with vibrant teal graphics and the tagline Explosion of Taste. The apartment setting remains unchanged throughout these transitions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a modern apartment as the content on a large television screen shifts from abstract visuals to character-driven programming and commercial advertisements. It begins with a view of the living room where the screen displays light beams and circuit board animations, while a sunny cityscape remains visible through the window behind the device. As the program changes, the abstract graphics give way to a talk show featuring two animated characters in vibrant outfits dancing and gesturing against a dark, holographic studio background. The scene then shifts as the television transitions into a series of commercial breaks, moving from a red channel logo to a Techtronika weapon advertisement and finally to a teal-colored promotion for Soybean Machistados. Throughout these digital transitions, the apartment environment remains still, with a remote control and drinking glass resting on the coffee table in the foreground.
